ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock for the day */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient to account for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company operates in */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of companies in the sector */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the sector */,
  "beta" REAL /* Average beta value of companies in the sector */,
  "eps" REAL /* Average earnings per share of companies in the sector */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Average dividend yield percentage of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of companies in the industry */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of companies in the industry */,
  "beta" REAL /* Average beta value of companies in the industry */,
  "eps" REAL /* Average earnings per share of companies in the industry */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Average dividend yield percentage of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* User's risk tolerance level */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* User's investment strategy */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* User's preferred method of contact (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the portfolio (e.g., percentage gain/loss) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock mapping */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the stock in the portfolio (e.g., percentage gain/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
